isolation.sourceKFX: REFERENCE/kindle_device_new/Sunrise on the Reaping (The Hunger Games)_B0D6BRYLL1.kfx

assertions.title: SunriseReaping produces 0 text diffs

steps.action: Convert SunriseReaping KFX to EPUB using kindle-helper
steps.observed: Successful conversion (with 460 unlocated referenced positions warning)

steps.action: Unzip both Go output and Calibre reference EPUBs
Compare all text files (excluding binary images/fonts), stripping dcterms:modified timestamps

evidence.pattern: All 31 diffs follow the same pattern: Go adds id="..." attributes to heading <div> elements that the Calibre reference does not have. Example: Go outputs '<div id="a3TH" class="heading_s3D-1">...' while Calibre outputs '<div class="heading_s3D-1">...'. One file (c3MA.xhtml) uses id="id__798_81_" format instead of short anchor IDs.

assertions.issues: 31 of 49 text files differ. All diffs are consistent: Go adds id anchor attributes to heading div elements that Calibre does not emit. This is a systematic difference in position anchor output, not content differences.

summary: FAIL: SunriseReaping has 31 differing text files (expected 0). All diffs are the same pattern: Go adds id="..." anchor attributes to heading <div> elements that the Calibre reference EPUB does not include. 18 text files match perfectly. No content or structural differences beyond the position anchor IDs.
